text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen announces that she will enter
the Kikuka Sho, leaving Mejiro Ryan feeling
unconfident about trying to match her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In defense of my racer, I tell McQueen that Ryan's
muscles are the weapon she's going to use to
defeat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is skeptical about this, but once she
sees Ryan's polished physique, her mind is
changed and she takes the challenge seriously.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, where the Mejiro family will
finally clash, is fast approaching.
